runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 324m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (17.67) behind Hotshot Lily in a NG on April 9. Has won two races from this draw. Expected to feature.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won easily by 4.5 lengths at Taree Super Track (17.34) beating Tout Belle in a Grade 5 on March 28. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.
